message:
Use Beeper API's iMessage account ID for chatdb backfill directory

Both the API backfill and chatdb backfill now write to the same
network directory (imessage_bcaed4855f1c27cd473add3da445716a),
so LogWriter dedup works across both sources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
